title: Priority Escalation
instruction: Find the oldest unread email from each of your VIP contacts (look for emails with the 'VIP' label). Mark each one as starred and reply with the exact phrase 'Status update: I am actively on it.'. Then create a filter that automatically stars future mail from elena.chen@vipfuture.test.
eval_check_descriptions: All target VIP emails were read and starred
Each VIP email received the required reply
Future VIP filter automatically stars matching messages

resolved_targets.status_phrase: Status update: I am actively on it.

emails.subject: Future priority escalation
emails.body:
I will be stepping into the executive sponsor role next quarter and will likely send a few requests directly once the transition starts.

No action needed yet. I just wanted to introduce the address early.

Thanks,
Elena

emails.subject: Circling back on last week's board prep
emails.body:
Thanks for the earlier notes. The revised draft looks cleaner now.

No action needed from you on this one unless the numbers move again.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Agenda draft for Monday check-in
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Theo

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Quick follow-up on the vendor recovery timeline
emails.body:
One more question on the vendor recovery timeline before tomorrow's exec sync.

If the risk posture changed after the last draft, I need to know whether procurement has already been looped in.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Reminder on document review timing
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Customer feedback from pilot cohort
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Sofia
